# Becton Dickinson Intern Project Coordinator - Software Engineering Project and Program Management Interview Preparation

Prepare for your Becton Dickinson Intern Project Coordinator - Software Engineering Project and Program Management internship interview with comprehensive practice questions and AI-powered feedback.

**Location:** San Diego, CA
**Application Status:** Currently Closed

## Interview Practice Features

- Real interview questions from Becton Dickinson
- AI-powered feedback and scoring
- Technical and behavioral question practice
- Company-specific preparation tips
- Industry insights and trends

## About This Opportunity

Becton Dickinson is offering a Intern Project Coordinator - Software Engineering Project and Program Management internship position in San Diego, CA. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in software engineering.




## Interview Preparation Tips

1. Research Becton Dickinson's products and mission
2. Practice coding problems and system design
3. Prepare behavioral examples using the STAR method
4. Review your resume and be ready to discuss projects
5. Prepare thoughtful questions about the role and company

## Start Your Interview Practice

Use our AI-powered interview practice tool to prepare for your Becton Dickinson interview and increase your chances of success.
